Sidarth Kumar

Cybersecurity student interested in digital forensics, robotics security, ROS 2, SLAM systems, and secure software environments.

About Me

I’m a cybersecurity-focused student with hands-on experience in digital forensics, network security, Docker-based test environments, and ROS 2 robotics security research.

I enjoy working on practical security problems: setting up test environments, analyzing system behavior, capturing network traffic, and explaining technical findings clearly.

Current Interests

  • Robotics and ROS 2 security
  • Digital forensics
  • Network traffic analysis
  • Secure system configuration
  • Dockerized testing environments
  • Cybersecurity policy and law

Featured Work

My current work focuses on testing how robotics systems respond to manipulated sensor data, especially in ROS 2 and SLAM environments.

See my Projects page for more details.
